entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Cajanus cajan L. Millspaugh, a legume crop grown in rainfed ecosystems during the monsoon season

entities.name: TRANSIENT WATERLOGGING
entities.description: Stress caused by continuous and heavy downpours during early monsoon seasons, leading to economic yield loss

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Country where pigeonpea is grown and faces significant economic yield loss due to waterlogging

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: Regions where pigeonpea is grown and faces waterlogging issues

entities.name: WATERLOGGING TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of pigeonpea genotypes to survive and maintain productivity under waterlogging stress

entities.name: IN VITRO SCREENING
entities.description: A screening process involving the submerging of seeds for 2, 4, 6, and 8 days to test survival

entities.name: POT CULTURE
entities.description: A standard screening protocol conducted over two years to evaluate genotypes under controlled conditions

entities.name: STRESS TOLERANCE INDEX
entities.description: A selection index used to identify waterlogging tolerant genotypes

entities.name: MEAN RELATIVE PERFORMANCE
entities.description: A selection index used to identify waterlogging tolerant genotypes

entities.name: RELATIVE EFFICIENCY INDEX
entities.description: A selection index used to identify waterlogging tolerant genotypes

entities.name: GENETIC VARIATION
entities.description: The diversity of genetic traits related to waterlogging tolerance within pigeonpea genotypes
